body: .app-button{appearance:none;backface-visibility:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#eef3f1 100%);border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);border-radius:16px;color:#123246;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Avenir Next','Segoe UI','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;margin:0 10px 10px 0;padding:10px 14px;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease,background .16s ease,border-color .16s ease,color .16s ease;}.app-button:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#e6f1ee 100%);border-color:rgba(15,118,110,.22);box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.12);color:#0d5562;transform:translateY(-1px);}.app-button:focus-visible{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,.18),0 16px 30px rgba(15,23,42,.14);outline:none;}.app-button:active{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fbfa 0%,#dbe9e5 100%);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(15,23,42,.12);transform:translateY(0);}.app-button--action{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.98) 0%,rgba(233,241,237,.96) 100%);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(15,23,42,.05);min-height:42px;}.app-button--action:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.99) 0%,rgba(223,239,232,.98) 100%);box-shadow:0 14px 26px rgba(15,23,42,.09);}.app-button--shell{background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);border-color:rgba(15,23,42,.08);color:#0f3a46;}.app-button--shell:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.96) 0%,rgba(229,241,238,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(15,118,110,.26);color:#0b5564;}.app-button--shell.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#123246 0%,#19506d 56%,#0f766e 100%);border-color:rgba(123,220,206,.44);box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(18,50,70,.26),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fbff;transform:translateY(-1px);}.app-button--shell.is-active:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#153b54 0%,#1f5f82 52%,#13857c 100%);border-color:rgba(150,240,226,.52);box-shadow:0 20px 38px rgba(18,50,70,.3),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#ffffff;}.app-button--persona{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(244,251,249,.98) 0%,rgba(228,241,235,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(15,118,110,.18);color:#115e59;}.app-button--persona:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(251,255,254,.99) 0%,rgba(220,244,238,.99) 100%);border-color:rgba(15,118,110,.3);color:#0f766e;}.app-button--persona.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f766e 0%,#0b5564 100%);border-color:rgba(148,240,227,.42);box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(15,118,110,.22),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fffd;}.app-button--ops{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(247,251,255,.98) 0%,rgba(233,242,255,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.16);color:#1d4ed8;}.app-button--ops:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.99) 0%,rgba(225,238,255,.99) 100%);border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.28);color:#1d4ed8;}.app-button--ops.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8 0%,#0f3f8c 100%);border-color:rgba(147,197,253,.48);box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(29,78,216,.22),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fbff;}.app-button--customer{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(243,252,249,.98) 0%,rgba(228,245,239,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(13,148,136,.16);color:#0f766e;}.app-button--customer:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.99) 0%,rgba(220,245,238,.99) 100%);border-color:rgba(13,148,136,.28);color:#0f766e;}.app-button--customer.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f766e 0%,#115e59 100%);border-color:rgba(153,246,228,.42);box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(15,118,110,.2),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fffd;}.app-button--finance{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,250,243,.98) 0%,rgba(252,239,218,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(217,119,6,.18);color:#b45309;}.app-button--finance:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.99) 0%,rgba(255,235,205,.99) 100%);border-color:rgba(217,119,6,.32);color:#b45309;}.app-button--finance.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c96f1a 0%,#a54a03 100%);border-color:rgba(253,186,116,.46);box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(201,111,26,.22),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#fffaf5;}.app-button--platform{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(247,249,252,.98) 0%,rgba(232,238,246,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(71,85,105,.18);color:#334155;}.app-button--platform:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.99) 0%,rgba(226,233,243,.99) 100%);border-color:rgba(71,85,105,.3);color:#1e293b;}.app-button--platform.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#334155 0%,#0f172a 100%);border-color:rgba(148,163,184,.48);box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(51,65,85,.22),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fafc;}.app-button.is-hidden{display:none!important;}.app-button--selection{background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border-color:rgba(191,113,43,.18);color:#8a5319;}.app-button--selection:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,250,244,.98) 0%,rgba(255,239,219,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(201,111,26,.3);color:#9f5410;}.app-button--selection.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c96f1a 0%,#f08b2d 100%);border-color:rgba(169,88,14,.48);box-shadow:0 16px 30px rgba(201,111,26,.24),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#fffaf5;transform:translateY(-1px);}.app-button--selection.is-active:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d67821 0%,#f59b41 100%);border-color:rgba(180,93,16,.58);box-shadow:0 20px 34px rgba(201,111,26,.28),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.2);}.app-input{background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.24);border-radius:16px;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.72);caret-color:#0f766e;color:#123246;font-family:'Avenir Next','Segoe UI','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;min-height:46px;padding:12px 14px;transition:border-color .12s ease,box-shadow .12s ease,background .12s ease;width:100%;}.app-input::placeholder{color:#7b8794;}.app-input:hover{border-color:rgba(59,130,246,.28);background:#ffffff;}.app-input:focus-visible{background:#ffffff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.44);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,.16);outline:none;}.app-input.is-invalid,.app-input:invalid{background:rgba(255,247,237,.96);border-color:rgba(194,65,12,.34);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.72);}.app-input.is-invalid:focus-visible,.app-input:invalid:focus-visible{border-color:rgba(194,65,12,.46);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(194,65,12,.14);}.app-field-error{color:#b45309;font-family:'Avenir Next','Segoe UI','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.01em;line-height:1.4;margin:-4px 0 12px;padding:0 4px;}.app-selection-list{scrollbar-color:rgba(148,163,184,.55) transparent;scrollbar-width:thin;}.app-button--record-select{align-items:center;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.99) 0%,rgba(243,248,250,.98) 100%);border-color:rgba(148,163,184,.22);border-left:4px solid rgba(15,118,110,.24);border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(15,23,42,.06);color:#173746;display:flex;justify-content:flex-start;line-height:1.45;margin:0;padding:16px 48px 16px 16px;position:relative;text-align:left;width:100%;}.app-button--record-select:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,1) 0%,rgba(232,244,247,.99) 100%);border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.26);box-shadow:0 16px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.10);color:#0f3a46;transform:translateY(-1px);}.app-button--record-select.is-active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#183b4d 0%,#1d5c78 100%);border-color:rgba(125,211,252,.38);border-left-color:#38bdf8;box-shadow:0 18px 34px rgba(20,62,94,.24),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fcff;transform:translateY(-1px);}.app-button--record-select.is-active:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4960 0%,#267090 100%);border-color:rgba(186,230,253,.48);border-left-color:#67e8f9;box-shadow:0 20px 38px rgba(20,62,94,.28),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#ffffff;}.app-button--record-select:focus-visible{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,.14),0 14px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.10);}.app-button--record-select:active{box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(15,23,42,.08);transform:translateY(0);}.app-button--record-select.is-active::after{color:#f8fffd;opacity:1;}.app-button--record-select::after{color:#0f766e;content:">";font-size:16px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;opacity:.76;position:absolute;right:16px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);}.app-selection-list .app-button--record-select:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}.app-selection-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:8px;}.app-selection-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(148,163,184,.48);border-radius:999px;}@media (max-width:720px){.app-selection-list{max-height:none;padding:6px;padding-right:4px;}.app-button--record-select{padding:14px 42px 14px 14px;}}
